steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice most effectively emphasizes the similarity between Judeth Insel and David Davidson. Both contributed their musicianship to India Arie's albums, so the correct choice must name both musicians and highlight that shared role.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — focuses only on one musician: Doesn't establish the parallel between both contributors. ✗
  • Choice B — avoids naming the musicians: Without naming both, the similarity can't be effectively emphasized. ✗
  • Choice C — uses a contrast structure: Emphasizes differences in their instruments rather than their shared contribution. ✗
  • Choice D — names both and uses "both" to highlight their shared contribution: Directly signals the similarity by stating that both lent their talents to India Arie's albums. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
